children.heading: Currency of payment
children.label: a Currency of payment
children.text: The principal amount owed under each new obligation issued under shall be repaid in United States dollars.section 1738c of this title

children.heading: Deposit of payments
children.label: b Deposit of payments
children.text: Principal repayments on new obligations issued under shall be deposited in Commodity Credit Corporation accounts.section 1738c of this title
